response.justification: Candidate has 20+ years of strong technical experience and some adjacent developer-tooling work (MCP code generators, CI/CD setup, GitLab/Docker infrastructure, AI-agent frameworks), plus a clear teaching/mentoring track record through workshops and courses. However, the resume shows individual-contributor roles throughout — there is no explicit people-management or direct-reports experience, which is a hard requirement (2 years). Mobile-platform exposure exists but is dated (iOS/Apple TV circa 2008–2009). Worth a screening conversation to probe for unlisted line-management responsibilities before committing further.
strengths: 20+ years of broad full-stack and systems engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Hands-on developer-tooling and infrastructure work: MCP generators, CI servers, Docker/Artifactory, test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing via Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course, and Web Internals workshop
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-reports experience listed — fails the 2-year minimum
Mobile-platform experience is limited and over 15 years old; role centers on a major mobile ecosystem
Developer-tools experience is partial/secondary rather than a sustained 3-year primary focus on compilers, build systems, or test automation at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit people-management track record
Limited recent mobile-platform and dedicated dev-tools depth
